name: Easter Nests
recipeInstructions:
1 Melt your coating mix. If using white chocolate, add a drop or two of green coloring (avoid liquid kinds).
2 Use a stainless steel bowl and melt in a pan of water (e.g., old large electric frypan for multiple colors). Wide mouth jars are also suitable.
3 Pour the melted coating into the coconut.
4 Spoon out onto wax paper, creating an indentation in the center to resemble a nest.
5 Add small jelly beans.
6 Place in the freezer for a few minutes to set before serving.
